themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Word-study detail reinforces "הָאָ֙רֶץ֙: between the earth - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".

themes.label: Peace/Rest
themes.summary: This chapter offers peace, rest, stillness, comfort, or settled safety in God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "Bede on Of the Temple of Solomon 1. 5.4-5: David had prepared by singing psalms, and the othe...". Word-study detail reinforces "וּשְׁלָמִ֑ים: and peace offerings - properly, requital, i.e., a (voluntary) sacrifice in thanks".
